app_type: fictional mobile marketplace discovery home screen

high_fidelity_structure.canvas: Portrait mobile viewport approximately 768 x 1664 px, with a light warm-peach status/header background flowing into a white commerce feed.
high_fidelity_structure.geometry: Top header occupies roughly 0-540 px and is densely packed. Tabs sit at y~88-151. The search bar spans 20-748 px at y~169-239, with scan icon on the left, query text in the middle, camera icon, and orange search button on the right. Shortcut icons are arranged five across in two rows from y~264-518. Three promo cards begin at y~541 with narrow gutters. The red announcement banner spans nearly the entire width at y~835-907. The product feed begins below it with two equal columns and 16 px outer margins. Bottom nav is fixed from y~1496-1606 above the OS navigation strip.
high_fidelity_structure.dominant_colour_blocks: Warm pale peach (#FFF1EA) behind status, tabs, and search; white (#FFFFFF) shortcut and feed areas; saturated orange (#FF5A00) for search and selection; vivid red (#FF160D) coupon strip; very pale pink (#FFF7F7) promo-card panels; charcoal/near-black text; orange-red price accents.
high_fidelity_structure.visual_density: Very high: compact Chinese labels, colourful shortcut glyphs, three promotional tiles, a banner, and image-led product cards all visible above a persistent navigation bar.
high_fidelity_structure.bottom_navigation_or_modal_drawer_state: No modal or drawer is open. A fixed white five-item bottom navigation is visible; its leftmost marketplace/home tab is active with a large orange circular mark, the messages tab has an orange 99+ badge, and the remaining tabs are inactive black outline icons.
primary_interaction_entries: Search input, scan control, camera control, and search submit button

replaced_source_assets.policy: All recognizable source marketplace branding, third-party logos, product photography, price claims, and screenshot wording must be replaced with original fictional equivalents.

brand.source_role: orange marketplace wordmark and related labels
brand.fictional_replacement: Mango Mart, using a custom orange mango-shaped glyph with no copied lettering

replaced_source_assets.shortcut_assets: Replace each source icon with an original flat vector-style pictogram: ticket, flask, coin, tote, kiosk, garden hut, fish, planet, quick-cart, and calendar.
replaced_source_assets.deal_assets: Use fictional original illustrations: a fruit sandwich, a translucent violet gamepad, and a small teal delivery bot.
replaced_source_assets.product_assets: Use newly created fictional images rather than source product photos: a modular charcoal-and-coral desk robot set and a white arched music mirror with a dark reading nook.
replaced_source_assets.copy_and_prices: Use fictional labels and prices only, for example "Mango Live", "Member Rebate", "Flash Lab", "¥8", "¥286", "¥142", "¥429", and "2.3k ordered".

visible_state.coupon_banner: Summer Snack Week — save up to 18%; claim ¥12

visible_products.title: Mango Select · modular desktop rover dock

components.name: StatusBar
components.details: light header background, time and generic system indicators

components.name: CategoryTabRail
components.details: single horizontal row, selected tab orange with short curved underline

components.name: MarketplaceSearch
components.details: orange rounded outline, scan icon, query, camera icon, filled search action

components.name: ShortcutGrid
components.details: five columns by two rows of illustrated shortcuts and compact labels

components.name: DealTriptych
components.details: three pale-pink image tiles with title, small colour accent copy, and pill-like price area

components.name: CouponTicker
components.details: bright-red rounded strip with speaker icon, campaign message, white claim capsule

components.name: ProductMasonry
components.details: two-column white product cards with rounded-top imagery and multiline metadata

components.name: BottomNav
components.details: fixed white bar, five evenly spaced destinations, active oversized orange mark, inbox count badge

components.name: SystemNavPlaceholder
components.details: white OS navigation region beneath app chrome

inferred_interactions.action: switches the discovery feed and moves the orange selection underline
edits the query and shows typeahead suggestions
opens results for the current query
adds the fictional ¥12 coupon and confirms success
changes the primary app section; Inbox exposes unread items

design_tokens.icon_style: friendly, saturated, rounded original vector illustrations with mostly white or pale backgrounds
